2605.28534.title: GUI-CIDER: Mid-training GUI Agents via Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection
2605.28534.paper_summary: Despite the rapid progress of multimodal large language models in building Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents, their real-world task completion is fundamentally bottlenecked by a lack of world knowledge about GUI operations. Existing solutions typically rely on expensive multi-agent scaffolding or conventional post-training paradigms, such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, post-training only allows agents to implicitly absorb world knowledge through action annotations or reward signals, leading to inefficient trajectory memorization rather than genuine comprehension. Therefore, an approach that enables explicit learning of this knowledge is imperative. To this end, we propose GUI-CIDER, a mid-training method that explicitly internalizes GUI world knowledge through Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection. GUI-CIDER operates in three stages: (1) data synthesis, which distills static planning and dynamic causal knowledge from GUI trajectories into text; (2) exemplar reselection, which filters the corpus by rewarding causal structures and penalizing semantic redundancy; and (3) mid-training, where the refined data is used to embed the acquired knowledge. Extensive experiments on two GUI knowledge benchmarks and three task completion benchmarks demonstrate that GUI-CIDER consistently improves both the agent's understanding of GUI operations and its task success rates.The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/GUI-CIDER.
2605.28534.paper_summary_zh: 儘管多模態大型語言模型在構建圖形用戶界面（GUI）代理方面取得了快速進展，但它們在現實世界中完成任務的能力根本上受到對GUI操作缺乏世界知識的瓶頸。現有的解決方案通常依賴於昂貴的多代理搭建或傳統的後訓練範式，如監督微調（SFT）和強化學習（RL）。然而，後訓練僅允許代理通過行動註釋或獎勵信號隱性地吸收世界知識，導致效率低下的軌跡記憶，而非真正的理解。因此，能夠明確學習這些知識的方法是必要的。為此，我們提出了GUI-CIDER，一種中期訓練方法，通過因果內化和密度感知範例重新選擇明確內化GUI世界知識。GUI-CIDER在三個階段運作：（1）數據合成，將靜態規劃和動態因果知識從GUI軌跡提煉成文本；（2）範例重新選擇，通過獎勵因果結構和懲罰語義冗餘來過濾語料庫；（3）中期訓練，使用精煉後的數據來嵌入所獲得的知識。在兩個GUI知識基準和三個任務完成基準上的大量實驗表明，GUI-CIDER始終提高了代理對GUI操作的理解及其任務成功率。代碼可在 https://github.com/Wuzheng02/GUI-CIDER 獲得。
2605.28534.author: Zheng Wu et.al.
2605.28534.authors: Zheng Wu, Chengcheng Han, Zhengxi Lu, Tianjie Ju, Yanyu Chen, Qi Gu, Xunliang Cai, Zhuosheng Zhang
